prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `17b80ad2`.
codex_response:
Implemented `17b80ad2` as a new ARC2 task package in [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_17b80ad2/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_17b80ad2/verifier.py#L1), and [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_17b80ad2/generator.py#L1). The rule is: only columns whose bottom cell is `5` are active; in each such column, scanning upward, every cell takes the most recent nonzero color seen at or below it. The summary hint was used because it matched the official examples, so no `notes.md` was needed. No new shared primitive was added.

Validation passed end-to-end: `5/5` official examples, `1000/1000` generated examples, and the build produced [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/17b80ad2/task.json), [originals.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/17b80ad2/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/17b80ad2/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/17b80ad2/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/17b80ad2/previews/preview_03.png). The generator stays close to the task family by using square grids, 1-3 marked columns with bottom `5`s, sparse singleton distractors in other columns, and occasional repeated anchor colors within marked columns.
